name: local-agent-coder
description: Agent + Plan coding assistant for local LM Studio models.

localAgent.lmStudio.apiKey.description: API key for LM Studio endpoint (LM Studio can accept any placeholder).

localAgent.lmStudio.model.description: Model name loaded in LM Studio.

localAgent.openRouter.simpleMode.description: Enable simple OpenRouter config (only API key + model). When enabled, provider is forced to OpenRouter.

localAgent.openRouter.apiKey.description: OpenRouter API key for simple mode.

localAgent.openRouter.siteUrl.description: Optional HTTP-Referer for OpenRouter simple mode.

localAgent.openRouter.appName.description: Optional X-Title for OpenRouter simple mode.

localAgent.provider.preset.description: Backend provider preset. 'custom' works with any OpenAI-compatible API.

localAgent.provider.baseUrl.description: Override base URL for provider preset (for example https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 or other OpenAI-compatible endpoints).

localAgent.provider.apiKey.description: Override API key for provider preset. Leave empty to reuse localAgent.lmStudio.apiKey.

localAgent.provider.model.description: Override model name for provider preset. Leave empty to reuse localAgent.lmStudio.model.

localAgent.provider.modelsPath.description: Path for model list endpoint on OpenAI-compatible APIs.

localAgent.provider.chatPath.description: Path for chat completion endpoint on OpenAI-compatible APIs.

localAgent.provider.extraHeaders.description: Extra HTTP headers as JSON object string. Example: {"X-Key":"value"}

localAgent.provider.openRouterSiteUrl.description: Optional HTTP-Referer sent when using OpenRouter preset.

localAgent.provider.openRouterAppName.description: Optional X-Title sent when using OpenRouter preset.

localAgent.inline.enabled.description: Enable inline code completion in editor (Copilot-like ghost text).

localAgent.inline.model.description: Optional model override for inline completion. Empty uses localAgent.lmStudio.model.

localAgent.inline.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay before requesting inline completion.

localAgent.inline.maxTokens.description: Maximum completion tokens for inline suggestions.

localAgent.inline.maxContextChars.description: Maximum context characters sent to model for inline completion.

localAgent.inline.maxSuggestionChars.description: Maximum characters returned for one inline suggestion.

localAgent.inline.maxCandidates.description: Number of inline completion candidates returned for cycling suggestions.

localAgent.inline.minPrefixChars.description: Minimum non-space chars before cursor required to trigger inline suggestion.

localAgent.inline.verboseLog.description: Write inline completion debug logs to Local Agent Coder output.

localAgent.inline.thinking.enabled.description: Enable thinking mode for inline completion requests.

localAgent.inline.thinking.effort.description: Reasoning effort for inline completion when inline thinking mode is enabled.

localAgent.thinking.enabled.description: Enable thinking mode for planning/execution requests.

localAgent.thinking.effort.description: Reasoning effort for planning/execution when thinking mode is enabled.

localAgent.maxTurnsPerStep.description: Maximum agent turns per plan step.

localAgent.strictResponsibilityMode.description: Run an internal responsibility review before execute actions (write/run/complete/final) to block off-scope behavior.

localAgent.executorMaxTokens.description: Max completion tokens for each executor turn. Increase if write_file JSON gets truncated.

localAgent.maxAskUser.description: Maximum times the agent can ask the user in one task.

localAgent.minInvestigationsBeforeExecut.description: Minimum list/search/read actions before write/run/complete to reduce blind edits.

localAgent.strategyCandidates.description: Number of candidate implementation approaches to evaluate before choosing the plan strategy.

localAgent.autoApplyWrites.description: Allow agent to write files directly.

localAgent.systemPromptExtra.description: Additional system prompt content appended to planner and agent prompts.
